steps.clue: Defeat the four champions and place their heads on the temple spikes.
Prepare the bone meal, charcoal, and dung.
Ferment the mixture, trigger Fire Bomb above it, and complete the Danu trial.
Ignite four bull symbols and complete both Ra obelisk trials.
Raise and charge the four lightning rods, then survive the arena trial.
Activate the nine underground symbols and complete the pit trial.
Enter the red portal and defeat the war elephants.
